content.fact: Second-years have basic spell competence but should not handle advanced defensive, nonverbal, or adult-level magic routinely.
content.injection: Do not let second-years handle advanced defensive, nonverbal, or adult-level magic routinely unless our story has established unusual training. Enforce this as a high-priority Context gate for Year 2; block contradictory later-book or earlier-state knowledge unless accepted story lore explicitly overrides it.
constraints: Treat second-year competence as basic school magic, not adult combat readiness.
Apply only when Saga Context matches Year 2; if the scene is earlier, withhold this fact or state.
This card should be promoted when its characters, topics, or objects appear because it prevents timeline leakage.
antiLore: Do not make advanced defensive magic routine for second-years.
Do not let generic model memory, film shorthand, fanon, or later-book knowledge override the active book Context.
Do not reveal, assume, or discuss this outcome before the relevant anchor/window is active unless the user has created an AU branch.
